allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const stat=fs.statSync\('assets/inuka-logo.png'\); console.log\('PNG size:', stat.size, 'bytes'\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const deps={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; console.log\('react-native-svg:', deps['react-native-svg']||'NOT FOUND'\); console.log\('expo-image:', deps['expo-image']||'NOT FOUND'\);")
